text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's already December 25th. I join Meisho Doto to
help with the preparations for a small
get-together we're having.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hmm-hmm. ♪ Holiday... ♪

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: La-di-daa. ♪ Happy holidays! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto continues humming this odd little
song. Eventually, we finish setting everything up.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'm so happy. I can't wait to see everyone
at the party!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
The me before coming to Tracen would never be
spending time with good friends like this.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Why? Well, um... let's say I didn't have anyone I
could call... a friend.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't make any, really. I've never lived long
enough in the same place.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I would say my fondest holiday memory is
probably the time I celebrated with my parents on
an air shuttle.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: That's right.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: We had to move around a lot for my dad's job.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I tried really hard to make friends, but I never
really got to know anyone long enough to get
invited to parties.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I kept on trying though! I tried, just...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
My mother and father saw how sad I was, so they
quietly celebrated with me on the plane.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
There were only candied carrots to eat and juice
to drink, but we still held hands and quietly sung
carols together.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Hmm-hmm. ♪ Holiday... ♪ La-di-daa. ♪ Happy
holidays!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now I know the story behind her little song. Not
only that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is probably one of the reasons why Meisho
Doto doesn't have much confidence. Everything
she built always came tumbling down.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But that's all in the past! ♪ Right now, I have a lot
of friends coming to celebrate.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I wonder when they'll be here. I just can't wait. I
wrote on the invitation to come thirty minutes
early, so it shouldn't be too long...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Aaaaahh! I forgot to send out the invitations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She screams in agony. Without receiving
invitations, no one will know to come. That makes
today...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh... This is just like my past. The two of us
alone, like I was with my family...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'll just sing my heart out! La, la, laa! Happy
holidaaays!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ring, ring!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh, someone's... here?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Darn tootin'! Is this where the party's supposed to
happen? Sorry I'm tardy!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I see you're runnin' this rodeo, Doto. Let's get the
party started!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat? How did you get my invitation if I never
sent it out?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's going on? Could it be I actually did
hand them out?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Or did you hand them out for me, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I don't remember doing anything like that...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Invitation? I didn't receive no invitation.
However...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I was passin' by when I got the sense a party was
happenin' somewhere! And ya can't have a party
without lots of people!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Turns out Taiki Shuttle decided to drop by on a
hunch. But then...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. I heard this is where the animal lovers
club was secretly hosting their special event
tonight.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Have I got the wrong place? Is this a
holiday party or something?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well, I'll be. Pardon my intrusion.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Holy cow! Your timin' couldn't have been better,
Nature! ☆ Join the celebration, won't ya?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Huuh... are you sure that's okay? I feel a little out
of place. Doto, is this your party?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes, it is. You can stay and enjoy yourself if
you'd like. No one else will be here anyway.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
We don't have many animals, but there is a
tanuki.

text_block_list.name: Tanuki
text_block_list.text: Yip, yip!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto may not have had many friends in
the past, but right now she has Taiki Shuttle and
Nice Nature.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And a tanuki.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What are you all doing?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Ayabe... You came?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But... my invitations, they weren't sent out...
How?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
We don't need a letter or permission to join in, do
we?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Besides, a certain someone has a habit of barging
in uninvited.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! Welcome all to my holiday party! I
presume all the guests have already arrived.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Um, Opera O, this party was organized by Doto's
fans.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch, I knew it would be cramped. That's why I told
everyone to find somewhere bigger.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Cramped? Uh-oh, do you need to stretch your
legs?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Happy holidays, Doto!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to running against you at the
Arima Kinen. Also, thank you so much for hosting
this gathering.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Trainer, wh-what's going on?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With all Meisho Doto's friends looking out for
her, it seems we didn't have to worry about
preparations after all.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come, Doto, commence the festivities! Let us
raise our glasses and sound a chorus of cheers to
your many fans!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, everyone, for doing something like
this for someone like me.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm slow, wimpy, and clumsy—I'm flawed in so
many ways, but I couldn't be happier right now!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: So please, raise your glasses. And cheeers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sploosh!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Waaagh! It spilled all over my head!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone laughs at what we all saw coming. With
her surrounded by many fans, the merrymaking
seems to go on forever.
